title: AML migration — full schema architecture
insight: Migration 20260425140001 creates: vw_member_credit_velocity_30d (rolling 30d spend per member+counterparty), vw_member_credit_concentration (largest counterparty pct), aml_flags table (flag_type enum, verdict enum, evidence_json, idempotent), aml_transaction_cycles, aml_review_audit_log (immutable), aml_sar_audit_log (immutable), aml_curator_roles. Platform_canonical gets aml_regulatory_classification row defaulting 'unclassified' — the SAR gate key.

title: Three-view schema: velocity + concentration + layering foundation
insight: vw_member_credit_velocity_30d groups (from_member_id, to_member_id) with sum/count/min/max over 30d. vw_member_credit_concentration uses a CTE to rank counterparties by spend-pct and surface the top-1 per member. Both views feed into the three Phase A flag rules without requiring application-layer aggregation.

title: Concentration flag rule (A.2) — dual AND gate
insight: runConcentrationFlagRule() triggers when: concentration_pct > 60 AND total_spend_30d > 500. Evidence JSON includes counterparty_id, pct, spend, volume, count, date-range, threshold values applied. Idempotent: getExistingActiveFlags() checks member+type before insert. If prior flag exists and is unresolved, no re-flag. Same dual-AND-gate pattern as K501 spark velocity anomalies.

title: Velocity spike flag rule (A.3) — null median guard
insight: runVelocitySpikeFlagRule() flags when spend_7d / median_weekly_90d > 5×. Null median (zero baseline) is explicitly excluded — new accounts have no baseline and are covered by A.4. Ratio rounded to 2dp in evidence. The multiplier=5 threshold is not exposed to members (guardrail: no threshold disclosure that aids evasion).

title: New-account high-velocity flag rule (A.4) — age + spend gate
insight: runNewAccountHighVelocityFlagRule() flags accounts < 30 days old with 7-day spend > $1000 equivalent. Evidence includes transaction_ids array for curator reference. Boundary: strictly-less-than 30 days and strictly-greater-than $1000 (boundary values do not trigger). All three rules run in parallel via Promise.all in runDailyAmlFlagJob.

title: Daily cron job — idempotent, runs all three rules at 03:00 UTC
insight: runDailyAmlFlagJob() calls all three rules in parallel and returns aggregated DailyCronResult (concentrationFlags, velocityFlags, newAccountFlags, totalNew, ranAt). The cron schedule (03:00 UTC) is a deployment-config concern; the function itself is time-agnostic. Idempotency guaranteed by per-rule existing-flag check before insert.

title: Coordinated-transactions detector — directed DFS, cycles 3-5
insight: coordinated_detector.ts builds a directed Credit-flow graph (A→B if A sent Credits to B). DFS detects cycles of length 3-5. Canonicalization: rotate so smallest member_id is first (directed cycles don't deduplicate reverse like K501's undirected Trust Match bonds). Shared canonicalize-then-seen pattern with K501 cycleDetector.ts. edgeVolumeMap passed by reference to avoid recomputing.

title: Trust Match cross-reference — joint structural+financial signal
insight: crossReferenceTrustMatch() marks cycle.trustMatchCrossref=true when ANY cycle member appears in K501's trust_match_cycles_audit. A member in both a Credit-transaction ring AND a Trust Match bond ring is a higher-confidence signal. Cross-ref triggers flag type 'aml_trust_match_crossref' instead of 'aml_coordinated_ring', and recommended_verdict='escalate' in evidence_json. Curator still makes the final call — no auto-escalate.

title: Coordinated ring: volume threshold + idempotent persistence
insight: runDailyCoordinatedAudit() only flags cycles when cumulative_volume > $500 threshold (below = noise). Existing cycles update last_seen_at only (no new flag if no new transactions since prior run). aml_transaction_cycles uses canonical_key UNIQUE constraint to prevent duplicates. linkCycleToFlag() links cycle row to aml_flags row for curator context.

title: SAR gate — SarGateError enforced before any draft generation
insight: sar_template.ts defines assertSarGateOpen() which throws SarGateError for classification 'unclassified' or 'not_msb'. buildSarDraft() calls this FIRST before any database access — fast-fail prevents any draft generation until counsel confirms classification. GUARDRAIL is both in TypeScript module and in the curator UI (dispatch_sar button greyed out). Two-layer enforcement.

title: SAR pre-population template — internal-only, never auto-filed
insight: buildSarDraft() produces SarDraft with FinCEN Parts I-IV pre-populated from evidence_json. Narrative auto-drafted per flag_type (buildNarrative()) with explicit 'counsel to finalize before any filing' disclaimers. delivery_note field repeats INTERNAL ONLY statement. appendSarAuditLog() runs after draft generation (immutable record). LB_INSTITUTION includes [TBD] placeholders for contact fields requiring counsel designation.

title: Curator review UI — AmlReviewPanel with SAR gate enforcement
insight: AmlReviewPanel.tsx: lists pending flags ordered by triggered_at. Per-flag: evidence table (EvidenceTable), member profile (signup, tx count, prior flags), curator notes textarea, VerdictButtons. dispatch_sar button is disabled+grayed with tooltip when sarEnabled=false. SAR confirmation dialog explicitly states 'NOT auto-filed.' Curator misuse note visible in review section. aml_trust_match_crossref flags get 'Elevated confidence' badge.

title: Curator opt-in — three-checkbox agreement gate
insight: CuratorOptInForm renders three required checkboxes: confidentiality, training, legal-advice-acknowledgment. Join button disabled until all three checked. Cap: 10 reviews/curator/week tracked in aml_curator_roles.weekly_review_count + weekly_reset_at. Earns audit-XP on completed reviews (XP award wired to verdict submission path in onVerdictSet handler).

title: Member education + ToS scaffold — no threshold disclosure
insight: FinancialIntegrityHelp.tsx: 8-FAQ plain-language page at /help/financial-integrity. Describes what AML is, why LB monitors, what kinds of patterns (high-level only — no thresholds). Explicitly states no auto-suspend, no auto-SAR. Regulatory classification status displayed honestly ('currently being determined by counsel'). TOS_AML_COOPERATION_CLAUSE_K504_SCAFFOLD.md: 6-section ToS scaffold for counsel review, including annual renewal notice and counsel checklist.
